content_body:
Best Georgia Cabins for Corporate Retreats & Family Reunions

Cabin Rentals of Georgia offers the best cabins in Georgia so it makes sense to plan your large group event around our unique cabin lodging in Blue Ridge, Georgia. Whether you are planning a corporate retreat, family reunion, yoga retreat, church retreat, or couples retreat, you will find that we have the best cabin rentals for large groups in the North Georgia Mountains, all of which are close to Downtown Blue Ridge and all the outdoor adventures that make Blue Ridge the special place that it is. Consider Blue Ridge, GA for your next large group gathering.

Let Us Help You Plan Your Retreat

Cabin Rentals of Georgia is pleased to offer the best Georgia cabins for large groups. Planning a large group event around cabin lodging is what we do best. Organizers for corporate retreats in the past have praised Cabin Rentals of Georgia for providing the best corporate retreat venue in the North GA Mountains. Many a family reunion made wonderful memories in our luxury lodges. We can direct you to our North Georgia riverfront cabin rentals that are perfect for family fun, team building, or even yoga seminars. Or if privacy and seclusion are in order, we have luxury cabin lodging in the famed Aska Adventure Area.

Popular Cabin Rentals for Large Groups

Our luxury cabin lodging around the Toccoa River is very popular for corporate retreats and family reunions. Over the years we have hosted many successful and memorable large group retreats in these cabins as they are in high demand. These 4-5 bedroom cabin rentals are high-end luxurious cabins offering privacy ensuite baths in each bedroom and many more unique amenities. 

Happy memories have been made by generational families who all got together in our Toccoa River luxury cabin rentals. Time spent down by the Toccoa River with fire pits and picnic tables created many fun moments tubing or fishing, or just hanging out in their hammock. Not only is our cabin lodging luxurious, but the surrounding property and ability to explore the beautiful mountains and riverside is priceless.

Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals Ideal for Large Groups

Rent one large cabin with lots of extra space for your large group or rent several cabins within close proximity to each other and some cabins even side-by-side. For instance, if you need cabin lodging that is within walking distance of each other, we have two large 5 bedroom/5.5 bath lodges identical in floor plan with spectacular mountain views and Toccoa River views ~ Riverview Lodge and Fallen Timber Lodge  along with The River’s Edge very close to these other two cabins.


Evening view of three Toccoa River Luxury Cabin Rentals~forefront is The River's Edge ~in the distance higher up is Fallen Timber Lodge & Riverview Lodge

Luxury Cabin Rental in a Gated Community

We also offer another luxury cabin that is situated in a gated community located a mile from these other large Toccoa River cabin rentals. High Hopes is an exceptionally luxurious cabin for rent that enjoys all paved roads and a gated community. A riverside pavilion is less than ½ mile down the road perfect for meetings and just enjoying the park-like area along the Toccoa River. 

Large Group Cabin Rentals in the Aska Adventure Area

Consider having your large group stay in our luxury cabins in the Aska Adventure Area. Serendipity on Noontootla Creek is a very spacious 5 bedroom/5.5 bath home sleeping 10 guests that features a large pavilion with a fireplace and conversational seating - perfect for yoga retreats or having meetings outside. The property adjacent this cabin is Cherokee Sunrise on Noontootla Creek which is quaint renovated 110 year old farmhouse that sleeps 4 guests. Sitting on 30 private acres, this property is perfect for any type of large group retreat you are planning as the possibilities are endless for corporate retreat team building, family retreat fun, or any other activities your large group might plan.

If a family retreat or corporate retreat is in your future, please give us a call so we can help take some of the burden off you and provide a vision for a memorable retreat in these beautiful North GA mountains of Blue Ridge, GA.
title: Best Georgia Cabins for Large Groups
